data.title: RED: Write test for agent separation enforcement in Step 6
data.description:
Write tests/scripts/test-fix-bug-agent-separation.sh with four subtests:
- test_step6_requires_root_cause_report: grep Step 6 for root_cause_report
- test_step6_has_hard_gate: grep Step 6 for HARD-GATE or blocks.*root_cause_report
- test_mechanical_exempt: grep for mechanical.*exempt or exempt.*mechanical
- test_bot_psychologist_exempt: grep for bot.psychologist.*exempt or exempt.*bot.psychologist

All must FAIL (RED) against current SKILL.md.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] bash -n tests/scripts/test-fix-bug-agent-separation.sh exits 0
  Verify: bash -n tests/scripts/test-fix-bug-agent-separation.sh
- [ ] Test file is executable
  Verify: test -x tests/scripts/test-fix-bug-agent-separation.sh
- [ ] Tests fail RED against current SKILL.md
  Verify: ! bash tests/scripts/test-fix-bug-agent-separation.sh
